scripts.clean: tsc -b --clean && find apps packages -type d -name dist -prune -exec rm -rf {} +
scripts.governance:report: agov assess --workspace governance.workspace.yaml --profile governance.profile.json --format markdown --output governance-report.md
scripts.governance:json: agov assess --workspace governance.workspace.yaml --profile governance.profile.json --format json --output governance-assessment.json
